rules.rule_text:
rule apt_all_JavaScript_ScanboxFramework_obfuscated
{
	meta:
		author = "Fidelis Security"
		reference = "https://www.fidelissecurity.com/TradeSecret"

	strings:
		$sa1 = /(var|new|return)\s[_\$]+\s?/
		$sa2 = "function"
		$sa3 = "toString"
		$sa4 = "toUpperCase"
		$sa5 = "arguments.length"
		$sa6 = "return"
		$sa7 = "while"
		$sa8 = "unescape("
		$sa9 = "365*10*24*60*60*1000"
		$sa10 = ">> 2"
		$sa11 = "& 3) << 4"
		$sa12 = "& 15) << 2"
		$sa13 = ">> 6) | 192"
		$sa14 = "& 63) | 128"
		$sa15 = ">> 12) | 224"

	condition:
		all of them
}
